scripts.build: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/src && cp index.html resume.html favicon.ico robots.txt sitemap.xml public/ && cp src/favicon.svg src/apple-touch-icon.png src/favicon-96x96.png src/site.webmanifest src/web-app-manifest-192x192.png src/web-app-manifest-512x512.png public/ && cp src/resume-converter.js public/src/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
